title: chrysopteris phymatodes
intro: Chrysopteris phymatodes, also known as the goldback fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chrysopteris phymatodes include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the goldback fern typically involve drying the fronds and infusing them in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
